title: DevPack
description: A collection of mods to help you code data packs & resource packs faster!
body:
# DevPack - A Modpack for developers
This modpack is for datapack and resource pack developers!

Feel free to recommend mods to add or ask anything on the [Discord server](https://openvoxel.studio/discord).

## ModList

### Useful
- [Axiom](https://modrinth.com/mod/axiom)
- [Better Suggestions](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-suggestions)
- [Better F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet)
- [Chat Calc (for 1.21)](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-calc-kt)
- [Datamancer](https://modrinth.com/mod/datamancer)
- [Flashback](https://modrinth.com/mod/flashback)
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam)
- [NBT Autocomplete](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbt-autocomplete)
- [World Edit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit)

### Small Tweaks
- [3D Skin Layer](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers)
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric)
- [Chat Heads](https://modrinth.com/mod/chat-heads)
- [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Disable Custom World Advice](https://modrinth.com/mod/dcwa)
- [Essential Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [More Chat History](https://modrinth.com/mod/morechathistory)
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling)
- [NBT Copy](https://modrinth.com/mod/nbt-copy)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [Suggestion Tweaker](https://modrinth.com/mod/suggestion-tweaker)

### Optimization
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core)
- [Immediatly Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) (has some issues with custom resource packs sometimes, feel free to disable)
- [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Modern Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modernfix)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)

### Doesn't fit elsewhere but still cool
- [Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)

### Dependencies
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin)
- [Yet Another Config Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)
